purpose: This repository defines data contracts for a loan selling and management system in the lending domain. It contains type definitions for loan entities, purchase processes, interest calculations, and account management, serving as a shared contract library between different services.
businessFeatures: Loan selling and purchasing between financial institutions

dataEntities.name: Loan
dataEntities.description: Represents a loan with its various attributes like ID, number, status, amount, interest rate, etc.

dataEntities.name: PurchaseAccount
dataEntities.description: Represents an account that can purchase loans

dataEntities.name: BatchInfo
dataEntities.description: Metadata about a batch operation, including progress statistics

dataEntities.name: Invoice
dataEntities.description: Represents a loan purchase invoice with details about loans to be purchased

dataEntities.name: Receipt
dataEntities.description: Receipt of a completed purchase transaction with success/failure details

dataEntities.name: Discrepancy
dataEntities.description: Represents differences found between loan and reference data

dataEntities.name: SofrRate
dataEntities.description: Secured Overnight Financing Rate used for interest calculations

dataEntities.name: Bank
dataEntities.description: Financial institution issuing or servicing loans

ambiguities: The exact services or applications consuming these contracts are not specified
Relationship between issuingBankId and servicingBankId is unclear
The exact nature of the COS transfer system referenced in AddTransferRequest
How batch operations are triggered or processed
Purpose of the 'field1' through 'field21' properties on LoanInfo
Whether PII data is encrypted or specially handled beyond the attribute marking
